description_long: This house features a modern, multi-level design built into a sloped terrain, with a prominent terracotta-tiled gable roof over the main entrance area. The structure is primarily composed of white and gray concrete walls, with black-framed windows and open terraces that provide outdoor living spaces. The front facade includes a fenced green lawn and a wide staircase leading up to the main entry, which is sheltered by the overhanging roof. The rear and side elevations reveal a stepped profile, with multiple levels and open balconies, as well as a garage entrance at the base. The house's windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large openings and others smaller, contributing to a contemporary aesthetic. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, blending modern architectural elements with practical outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-level house with a terracotta-tiled gable roof, white and gray concrete walls, and open terraces built into a sloped site. Features include a fenced lawn, wide staircase, and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the terracotta-tiled gable roof, fenced green lawn, wide staircase, and main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped terrain, upper-level terraces, and the solid concrete wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stepped profile of the house, garage entrance at the base, and partial view of the roof and balconies.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open terraces, green lawn, and the integration of the house into the sloped landscape.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, covered by a terracotta-tiled gable roof, and a fenced porch area.
